vol_description: Please upload videos that are representative of the different groups, conditions, and tasks that you plan to code. Having at least 5-6 videos would be great. Karen and I will look at the videos beforehand and prepare. As soon as we are done with the workshop, you can take us off the volume so we no longer have access to the data.
vol_short_name: Datavyu Workshop 2016/01/08 Rebecca Brand & Amanda Brandone
